description_for_human: Build, test, and deploy production-grade AI agents with tool calling, grading pipelines, multi-agent teams, and MCP endpoints.
description_for_model: Kopern is an AI agent builder platform. Users create custom AI agents with system prompts, skills (markdown knowledge), custom tools (JSON Schema + JS), extensions (lifecycle hooks), and grading suites (6 criterion types). Agents support multi-provider LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini), GitHub repo integration, multi-agent teams, pipelines, and MCP server endpoints. Key capabilities: tool calling, deterministic evaluation, real-time streaming, session management, billing tracking.
